message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
interface IController {
    +getPlanets()
    +addPlanet(Planet)
    +updatePlanet(Planet)
    +deletePlanetById(int)
    +getUFOsByPlanetId(int)
    +addUFOToPlanet(UFO, int)
    +updateUFO(UFO)
    +deleteUFOById(int)
    +deleteUFOsByPlanetId(int)
}

class Controller <<C>>
    Controller --|> IController

interface IDatabase {
    +getPlanets()
    +savePlanet()
    +deltePlanet()
    +newPlanet()
}

class RelationalDatabase <<C>>
    RelationalDatabase --|> IDatabase

class GUI <<C>>
    GUI --> IController
    GUI ..> Controller
    Controller ..> IDatabase
    IController --> IDatabase

@enduml
```
